iterations.changes: Initial rewrite: phases, taxonomy, output template, guidelines.
No skill changes. Ground truth eval on taskflow (28 planted issues).
Expanded logging security pattern. Added hardcoded delay/sleep performance pattern. New test project: datamill (15 issues + 5 FP traps).
No skill changes. Validation on harder test project: eventbus (10 subtle issues + 2 FP traps + 8 clean code pieces). Tests false positive resistance on async code patterns.
iterations.notes: 100% recall on hardest test repo yet. Both FP traps avoided (parameterized SQL correctly identified as safe, dedup overflow not falsely flagged). Clean code (MemoryStorage, Event, RetryMiddleware.with_retry implementation, create_webhook_handler) not flagged as buggy.
iterations.verdict: commit — validates skill on new domain (async event bus), no changes needed
